channel.title: Typescript on Plakar | The Open Standard for Backup and Restore
channel.description: Recent content in Typescript on Plakar | The Open Standard for Backup and Restore

item.title: Plakar UI #3: TypeScript
item.description: Two TypeScript features that will surprise Go developers: incremental refactoring without blocking the compiler, and discriminated unions with automatic type narrowing.

item.title: Plakar UI #4: Zod
item.description: TypeScript types only protect your own code — Zod validates data at runtime API boundaries, turning silent undefined bugs into immediate, descriptive parse errors.
